markdown:
#  Edit Your Company Information for the Procore Construction Network 
##### Limited Release
The [Procore Construction ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network)[Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network) is currently available in English in Canada and the United States.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * Logos must be smaller than 10MB and be a supported file type: jpg, png, svg, webp, bmp.
  * Addresses in Quebec are not yet supported.


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Account and Profile** icon.  
This shows as your initials by default, or an avatar if you uploaded an image.  
![Clipboard E644461258e28592a777d9f5e4018942f](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/69adc0cc20f485dc046376dd2bc3c57d/3c7217c2dbf18c0d15e169caf65e2554/clipboard_e644461258e28592a777d9f5e4018942f.png?fm=webp)
  3. Click **Account Settings**.
  4. Click the **Company Information** tab.
  5. Click the **Edit** ![Icon Edit2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/60cfc64d76d10b52cd7d785b4bfdc9e5/794e5b31acad2246f1d1f6fb29a3d532/icon-edit2.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon to edit information in a specific section.
     * To edit your Company Logo, click the **Camera**![Icon Camera](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8cfa1e5add6c64e1f1d534bd618f1dd4/a6d59c8f144bcc8d27e4086533d42bc1/icon-camera.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon and select to **Upload New** , **Edit** , or **Delete**.  
Note: This logo displays on your [business page](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-construction-network/tutorials/edit-your-profile-visibillity-for-the-procore-construction-network) when people search for your company on the Procore Construction Network.
  6. After you are done making changes, click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * [What changes when companies upgrade to paid accounts?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-changes-when-companies-upgrade-to-paid-accounts)
  * [What should I know about claiming a business on the Procore Construction Network?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-should-I-know-about-claiming-a-business-on-the-procore-construction-network)
title: Edit Your Company Information for the Procore Construction Network
description: How to edit your company information for the Procore Construction Network.
